Not connected yet — nothing is filled in until you review and apply it
Set a quick-lock PIN

If the directory sits idle for 30 minutes, Pegasus will lock and ask for this PIN instead of the full shared password. It's a separate, local-only code — three wrong tries and it disconnects you completely, requiring the shared password again.

Session locked

Pegasus locked the directory after 30 minutes of inactivity. Enter your PIN to continue.

1 Unit & document details
Which renewal this is — "1" for the first, "2" for the second, and so on
Appears once in the intro clause, e.g. "1 January 2024"
2 Tenant details
Company registration numbers (C-, SP-, P- prefixed) automatically switch the label wherever it appears

Auto-filled from the dates; edit if needed
